author: y4rr
content: Landed in cf6047b1b (release 0.5.6). GpuVaeEncoder + GpuDownsample + GpuDownEncoderBlock, composing existing ferrotorch-gpu kernels (gpu_conv2d_f32, gpu_group_norm_f32, gpu_silu, gpu_scale, gpu_clamp, gpu_exp, gpu_mul, gpu_add) plus gpu_philox_normal. Channel split via CudaSlice::slice + memcpy_dtod (GPU->GPU, no host bounce). 3 new GPU conformance tests run UNGATED on the RTX 3090: cpu/gpu mode parity, sample shape+finiteness, and a rust-gpu-discipline forbidden-pattern-#7 trip-wire via the new encode_with_gpu_params_probe API. B=1 enforced; B>1 returns InvalidArgument (strided gather kernel is the follow-on). cargo test -p ferrotorch-diffusion --features cuda --lib: 86 passed (was 83). cargo clippy --features cuda --all-targets -- -D warnings clean. Forward path stays GPU-resident; only cpu_to_gpu at API entry, gpu_to_cpu at exit (matches existing GpuVaeDecoder shape).
